commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Mattermost send handling for filePath, path, buffer, filename/contentType, and attachments[] payloads, plus tests for those upload paths.

PR surface: Source +161, Tests +146. Total +307 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main source shows Mattermost send only forwards params.media, while the linked live report demonstrates ok:true with empty file_ids for filePath/attachments; I did not run a live Mattermost repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the PR has concrete message-delivery/security blockers and missing contributor live Mattermost proof that automation cannot provide for the contributor environment.

target.title: fix(mattermost): support filePath, buffer, and attachments in message send (fixes #87930)
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes **#87930** — the Mattermost message tool was returning `ok:true` for file attachment payloads (`filePath`, `attachments[].filePath`, `attachments[].path`, `buffer` + `filename`) while the resulting Mattermost posts had `file_ids: []`.

## Root Cause

The Mattermost `send` action path only forwarded `params.media` as `mediaUrl`. All other attachment-shaped fields were silently ignored.

## Changes

### `extensions/mattermost/src/channel.ts`
- Map `params.path` and `params.filePath` to `mediaUrl` (consistent with Discord).
- Extract `buffer`, `filename`, `contentType`/`mimeType`, and `attachments[]` from tool params.
- Pass `mediaReadFile` and `mediaLocalRoots` into `sendMessageMattermost` (and `sendMedia`).

### `extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/send.ts`
- Extend `MattermostSendOpts` with `filePath`, `buffer`, `filename`, `contentType`, and `attachments`.
- Collect all attachments into a `pendingUploads` list.
- Upload each via the native Mattermost two-step flow (`POST /api/v4/files` → `POST /api/v4/posts` with `file_ids`).
- Fail loudly when `filePath` attachments are provided without `mediaReadFile`, instead of returning `ok:true`.

### `extensions/mattermost/src/mattermost/send.test.ts`
- Add tests for `filePath`, `buffer`, `attachments` array, combined `mediaUrl` + `attachments`, and error cases (missing `mediaReadFile`, failed file read).

## Verification

- New unit tests cover the four attachment shapes reported in #87930.
- Existing `mediaUrl` upload path is preserved with its original fallback behavior.

Fixes #87930
target.author: ztexydt-cqh
